race.description: Spelling At Domeland Super Mdn Plate
race.comment: ONMALONE (5) returns from a 23-week spell. Speedy three-year-old who raced well last prep, the highlight a 0.7 length third over 1250m at Canterbury. Two recent trials will have him forward enough to run a big race. WEEKEND MARKET (11) has improved at each appearance this prep, the latest a narrow defeat over 1100m at Hawkesbury in heavy going. Very fit and needs 1200m at this stage of the campaign. COLD GIN (10) has disappointed at her last couple of runs but the addition of blinkers may spark a revival. FIMISTON (2) First-starter for the Gerald Ryan & Sterling Alexiou stable. Two trials have been just fair. Betting the guide.
